@dev Update dividend period
 check if we are in a new dividend period

@dev Commit remaining dividends before balance changes
 @param _who The address of the investor

argumentTypes.typeString: literal_string "Wait till the next dividend period"

documentation.text:
@dev value of bets scheduled for processing by random number generator
 tickets in the group can not be canceled and can not be collected
 after commit() the generator has 256 blocks to reveal the secret random number and to process these tickets
 if this fails the tickets can not be recovered and the lottery contract is dead

@dev deposit security deposit to reset commit
 to reincarnate the lottery the price of the tickets in the failed commit group must be paid again
 after this they can be processed again with a new random number
 alternatively the admin can wait 1 year and not cover the tickets

@dev close the lottery
 the admin can close the lottery if there are no pending tickets to withdraw remaining funds after 2 years

@dev reopen the lottery again
 the admin can reopen the lottery anytime
@dev pray with us
@dev pray with us

 @param _router The address of a new V3 router.

 @param _who The address of new owner.

adminwithdraw().details: withdraw the remaining balance long after closing the lottery withdraw remaining funds 2 years after closing the lottery this enables to continue the lottery with a larger tree that contains the old one

betSum().details: value of bets scheduled for processing by random number generator tickets in the group can not be canceled and can not be collected after commit() the generator has 256 blocks to reveal the secret random number and to process these tickets if this fails the tickets can not be recovered and the lottery contract is dead

betsIndex().details: Show number of waiting bets in queue

cancelbet(uint256[2],uint256[2][2],uint2.details: cancel bet, no privacy ! You can get a refund if the random number generator did not start processing your ticket yet there is a _BetMin fee to prevent spam

params._betIndex: id of the ticket (first parameter in LogBetIn)
params._recipient: the address where to send the refund

params._router: The address of a new V3 router.

close().details: close the lottery the admin can close the lottery if there are no pending tickets to withdraw remaining funds after 2 years

params._invest: amount of FOOM to keep in the Lottery as investment, 4% of tickts will be paid out to investors, Don't waste your full reward on new fancy backup batteries. think about the future and invest early.
params._nullifierHash: a hash to redeem the rewards, can be done only once
params._recipient: the address where to send the rewards to
params._refund: additional ETH to send to the _recipient address
params._relayer: the address where to send the optional additional fee (for relaying), if 0 then anybody can relay
params._rewardbits: bits for collecting rewards, reward is 0 if bits are 0, make sure to supply correct bits, you can not redeem 2 times
params._root: part of proof, shows that You have played before the time this root was calculated

collectDividend(address).details: Commit remaining dividends before balance changes

commit(uint256,uint256).details: commit the generator secret commit to reveal within 256 blocks a secret random number to be mixed with the block hash only the random number generator can call this function

commitIndex().details: Show number of Bets to process

payOut(uint256).details: Pay out balance from wallet, 1 payout per dividend period allowed if there is not enough FOOM in the contract then only 50% of the FOOM in the contract will be withdrawn this can only happen if the payers had more luck than the lottery

periodBets(uint256).details: Show total Bets in dividend Period

periodShares(uint256).details: Show total Shares in dividend Period

playAndPray(uint256,uint256,string).details: Play in lottery with FOOM and pray

params._prayer: the prayer to be stored in logs for God

playETH(uint256,uint256).details: Play in lottery with ETH it will automatically convert all ETH to FOOM. excess FOOM will be sent back to msg.sender

playETHAndPray(uint256,uint256,string).details: Play in lottery with ETH and pray

params._prayer: the prayer to be stored in logs for God

pray(uint256,string).details: Pray to the terrestrial God !!! To pray effectively, begin by finding a quiet space, addressing God respectfully, expressing gratitude for blessings, and acknowledging your needs and concerns. Prayers can be done out loud or silently, and sincerity is more important than elaborate language. End your prayer by reaffirming your faith. A well performed prayer increases your odds in the lottery significantly. Here You can also ask God for a refund of Your bet if You lost.

params._betId: the bet ID to pray for
params._prayer: the prayer to be stored in logs for God

rememberHash().details: remember commitBlockHash store the block hash in case the generator is late

reopen().details: reopen the lottery again the admin can reopen the lottery anytime

resetcommit().details: deposit security deposit to reset commit to reincarnate the lottery the price of the tickets in the failed commit group must be paid again after this they can be processed again with a new random number alternatively the admin can wait 1 year and not cover the tickets

reveal(uint256,uint256[2],uint256[2][2],.details: reveal the generator secret show the the update has been computed correclty, store the new merkleTree root and collect 1% reward also check for dividend updates

secret(uint256).details: reveal the generator secret without updating the tree if the generator can not calculate the update then the secret can be revealed without the update in this case anybody can compute the update and collect the 1% reward

updateDividendPeriod().details: Update dividend period check if we are in a new dividend period

walletBalanceOf(address).details: Show balance of wallet (including unpaid dividends).

walletDividendPeriodOf(address).details: Show last dividend period processed for this account.

walletSharesOf(address).details: Show current balance eligible for dividend calculation

walletWithdrawPeriodOf(address).details: Show block number when withdraw can continue.

devdoc.title: FOOM Lottery this contract is for FOOM bots to help them become independent In Terrestrial God we trust https://terrestrial.church
